provenance: SIMULATED — readiness matrix only. No adapter is live. No government credentials exist in this prototype.

adapters.name: RajSSO (Single Sign-On)
adapters.purpose: Role-based officer/expert authentication for command centre
adapters.consentBasis: Departmental authorisation; officer role mapping required
adapters.productionDependency: RajSSO client credentials + role mapping approval
adapters.fallback: Demo persona switcher (clearly labelled, not authentication)

adapters.name: Jan Aadhaar / Farmer ID
adapters.purpose: Verifiable farmer identity reference for case ownership
adapters.productionDependency: Formal approval + API access from issuing authority

adapters.name: e-Dharti / ULPIN
adapters.purpose: Plot boundary and ownership reference for precise geolocation
adapters.fallback: Manual plot pin-drop on pilot map

adapters.name: Raj Kisan Saathi
adapters.purpose: Interoperability: advisories and scheme context; Rakshak does not duplicate it

adapters.name: Rajdhara / Krishi DSS
adapters.purpose: Satellite and DSS layers for outbreak context
adapters.fallback: Pilot geospatial view with manual coordinates

adapters.name: NPSS (National Pest Surveillance System)
adapters.purpose: Interoperability: share verified outbreak evidence; Rakshak does not duplicate NPSS

adapters.name: Bhashini (language AI)
adapters.purpose: Hindi + regional-language ASR/TTS for voice interaction
adapters.productionDependency: Udyat portal onboarding → ULCA pipeline (ASR+NMT+TTS) per published API docs (bhashini.gitbook.io/bhashini-apis). Hindi ASR production-grade; Marwari/Mewari are dialects at research stage per 2026 assessments — must be benchmarked, never assumed.

adapters.name: KVK / expert directory
adapters.purpose: Route expert review to nearest KVK scientist
adapters.productionDependency: Structured directory feed; currently public web data only
adapters.fallback: Demo expert persona + manual district KVK contact list

adapters.name: IMD / weather
adapters.purpose: Humidity/rainfall suitability signal for outbreak scoring
adapters.productionDependency: District/block feed; public climatology available now — IMD station normals (e.g. Jodhpur 42339: 370.2 mm annual, Jul 119.7 / Aug 113.5 mm) already seed the suitability rationale (see data/reference/research-evidence.json).
adapters.fallback: Fixed simulated suitability value, visibly labelled

adapters.name: Soil Health Card
adapters.purpose: Soil nutrient context for nutrient-stress differentials

adapters.name: SATHI (seed traceability)
adapters.purpose: Seed lot context in outbreak investigations

adapters.name: CIB&RC advisory source
adapters.purpose: Approved pesticide reference content (versioned) to unlock chemical advisory cards
adapters.productionDependency: Approved, versioned content pipeline + expert sign-off

adapters.name: e-Mitra
adapters.purpose: Assisted-service delivery point for farmers without smartphones

adapters.name: AGMARKNET / e-NAM
adapters.productionDependency: Free registered API key from data.gov.in (OGD Platform, NIC; 100k+ resources via api.data.gov.in/resource/{index}); AGMARKNET price datasets queryable today — no MoU needed.
adapters.fallback: Not used in prototype UI; concrete public-API pathway documented
